languages.text: "Эоганн, мне нужна правда. Что на самом деле случилось на Амсанкте?"
"Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, мне нужна правда. Что на самом деле случилось на Амсанкте?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"
"Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"
"Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"

languages.text: «Eogunn, necesito saber la verdad. ¿Qué pasó en Amsanct en realidad?».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, necesito saber la verdad. ¿Qué pasó en Amsanct en realidad?».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，我需要知道真相。阿姆桑克特上到底出了什么事？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，我需要知道真相。阿姆桑克特上到底出了什么事？”

languages.text: « Eogunn, je dois tout savoir. Que s'est-il passé sur Amsanct ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, je dois tout savoir. Que s'est-il passé sur Amsanct ? »

languages.text: "Eogunn, gerçeği bilmeliyim. Amsanct'ta gerçekten ne oldu?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, gerçeği bilmeliyim. Amsanct'ta gerçekten ne oldu?"

languages.text: "Eogunn, ich brauche die Wahrheit. Was ist wirklich auf Amsanct passiert?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, ich brauche die Wahrheit. Was ist wirklich auf Amsanct passiert?"

languages.text: "エオグン、真実が知りたい。アムサンクトで何があったのか？
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I need the truth. What really happened on Amsanct?"
